text: I feel a sense of curiosity in these spaces. The first image envelops me in a serene quietude—an emptiness that prompts reflection, an invitation to contemplate space and potential. The soft carpeting and muted palette make me feel calm, but also a bit out of place in its sterility. In the second image, surrounded by colorful walls and the language of innovation, I sense excitement and possibility. The exhibits and words spark thoughts about progress and our relationship with technology. I feel swept along into a world of inquiry, recognition of rapid change, and the thrill of what may come next.
